Class SchedulingConflict

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.smarthome.model.SchedulingConflict
public final class SchedulingConflict extends Object
Represents a scheduling conflict between two rules or schedules. A conflict exists when two enabled automations target the same device with incompatible target values that overlap in time.

  • Constructor Summary

    Creates a scheduling conflict record.

  • Constructor Details

    • SchedulingConflict

      public SchedulingConflict(String conflictId, String candidateId, String conflictingId, String candidateName, String conflictingName, String deviceId, String deviceName, String candidateValue, String conflictingValue, String candidateTime, String conflictingTime, String description)
      Creates a scheduling conflict record.
      Parameters:
      conflictId - unique conflict identifier
      candidateId - ID of the candidate rule/schedule
      conflictingId - ID of the conflicting rule/schedule
      candidateName - name of the candidate
      conflictingName - name of the conflicting automation
      deviceId - target device ID
      deviceName - device display name
      candidateValue - target value of the candidate
      conflictingValue - target value of the conflicting automation
      candidateTime - trigger time of the candidate
      conflictingTime - trigger time of the conflicting automation
      description - human-readable conflict description
